CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/RICHARD DE JAUR- EGUI AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2048 POLK ST, #217, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM, 11-1-93 - PL. WAIVES ALL BACK RENT & DAMAGES & WILL PAY PL. $500 WITHIN 10 DAYS IN CON- SIDERATION FOR VOLUNTARILY VACATING PREMISES - IF DEF. FAILS TO VACATE, JUDGMENT TO ENTER AS TO POSSESSION ONLY - UPON VACATING, PL. WILL DISM. THE ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT SEPAND, CYRUS
DECLARATION RE DEFAULT ON TERMS OF STIPULATED AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADWAY HOTEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEPAND, CYRUS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2048 POLK ST, UNIT 217, S.F, CA., PL. TO PAY DEF. $500 WITHIN 10DAYS OF 10-12-93. ALL RENT & DAMAGES WVD. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
